concepts.title: Riemann surfaces as 1D complex manifolds
concepts.blurb: Complex one-manifolds support holomorphic charts and conformal geometry.

concepts.title: Branched covers and maps
concepts.blurb: Holomorphic maps behave like branched coverings with controlled ramification.

concepts.title: Riemann–Hurwitz and uniformization
concepts.blurb: Genus, ramification, and universal covering classify compact Riemann surfaces.
